basic_details.job_title: Chennai Port Authority Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Port Authority is recruiting 4 Junior Executive (Finance) on contract basis.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Proficiency in SAP FICO functionalities | age limit: Maximum 30 years as on 01.07.2026
qualification.education_qualification: CA/CMA (Inter) passed with Articleship/Internship completion OR M.Com degree with minimum 3 years post qualification experience in Accounting & Finance

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Written Examination (if required) followed by Personal Interview Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application form from the Careers page on www.chennaiport.gov.in
Fill the application with all relevant details and attach necessary enclosures
Send the hard copy to the address below
Also send a scanned copy by email
Address: The Financial Advisor & Chief Accounts Officer (FA&CAO) Chennai Port Authority 3rd Floor, Centenary Building, Rajaji Salai Chennai - 600 001 (Opp. to RBI)
Consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month (no other benefits)
Contract period of 2 years (extendable based on performance)
Medical facilities, accommodation (subject to availability), etc., as per rules
Strict confidentiality and full-time commitment required
Termination possible with notice or without notice for unsatisfactory performance
important_instructions: Only physical applications received by the due date will be considered. The Port reserves the right to conduct written test for shortlisting. This is a professional contractual engagement - no regular service benefits. Unauthorized absence will result in "no work, no pay".

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Chennai Port Authority, Finance Department has invited applications for engagement of Junior Executive (Finance) on contract basis for a period of 2 years. Download Chennai Port Authority Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of applications Written Examination (if required) followed by Personal Interview Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Chennai Port Authority Junior Executive Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application form from the Careers page on www.chennaiport.gov.in Fill the application with all relevant details and attach necessary enclosures Send the hard copy to the address below Also send a scanned copy by email Address: The Financial Advisor & Chief Accounts Officer (FA&CAO) Chennai Port Authority 3rd Floor, Centenary Building, Rajaji Salai Chennai - 600 001 (Opp. to RBI) Email: [email protected] Last Date: 28 July 2026 Consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month (no other benefits) Contract period of 2 years (extendable based on performance) Medical facilities, accommodation (subject to availability), etc., as per rules Strict confidentiality and full-time commitment required Termination possible with notice or without notice for unsatisfactory performance

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only physical applications received by the due date will be considered. The Port reserves the right to conduct written test for shortlisting. This is a professional contractual engagement - no regular service benefits. Unauthorized absence will result in "no work, no pay".

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Chennai Port Authority Junior Executive (Finance) 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Junior Executive (Finance) in Chennai Port Authority?
faq.answer: Total 04 vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Junior Executive (Finance) on contract?
faq.answer: Consolidated pay of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification required?
faq.answer: CA/CMA (Inter) with Articleship OR M.Com with minimum 3 years post qualification experience in Accounting & Finance.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for Chennai Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 30 years as on 01.07.2026.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Chennai Port Authority Junior Executive post?
faq.answer: Submit the filled application in prescribed format by post to FA&CAO and also send scanned copy to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job in Chennai Port Authority?
faq.answer: No. It is a contractual engagement for 2 years (extendable based on performance).

faq.question: Q8. Will there be a written exam for selection?
faq.answer: Chennai Port Authority may conduct a written examination for shortlisting candidates for interview.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable skills for this position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in SAP FICO functionalities will be given preference.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the place of posting for selected candidates?
faq.answer: Finance Department, Chennai Port Authority (may be posted anywhere as per requirement).
